hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git commit' 2>/dev/null; then cd /Users/jominho/Develop/ai-study && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -E 'error|Error|✓|✅' | tail -5; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo '❌ QA_GATE FAILED: 빌드 실패. 커밋 차단.'; exit 1; fi; echo '✅ QA_GATE PASSED'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git push' 2>/dev/null; then echo '📦 COMPOUND: push 완료! /compound 실행하여 changelog + 회고 + 솔루션 문서화하세요.'; fi
